entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop under investigation

entities.name: HETEROTIC POOLS
entities.description: Groups of parents that, when crossed, produce hybrids with superior performance

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genetic distance analysis

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of molecular divergence between hybrid parents

entities.name: CLUSTERING PATTERN
entities.description: The arrangement of parents into groups based on genetic distance

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSSING
entities.description: A mating design used to develop and evaluate hybrids

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the hybrids were evaluated

entities.name: MID-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: The difference between the hybrid's grain yield and the average of its parents

entities.name: BETTER-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: The difference between the hybrid's grain yield and the better parent's yield

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The primary trait evaluated for heterosis in pearl millet

entities.name: SEED PARENTS
entities.description: Parents used as the female line in hybrid crosses

entities.name: RESTORER PARENTS
entities.description: Parents used to restore fertility in hybrid crosses

entities.name: HPB1
entities.description: A specific heterotic pool identified for seed parents

entities.name: HPB2
entities.description: A specific heterotic pool identified for seed parents

entities.name: HPR3
entities.description: A specific heterotic pool identified for restorer parents

entities.name: HPR4
entities.description: A specific heterotic pool identified for restorer parents
